name: Ceviche Solero
recipeIngredient: 1 pound shrimp, cleaned, peeled, and cut into pieces
1 pound snapper fillets, skinned and cut into 1-inch cubes
4 ounces diced red bell pepper (about 3/8 cup)
pepper strips and lime slices – for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook shrimp in boiling water just until heated through, about 1 minute. Drain and refrigerate, covered, until chilled.
2. In a large bowl, combine snapper cubes, olive oil, orange juice, white vinegar, lime juice, garlic, red onion, diced red bell pepper, jalapeño (with seeds), ground cumin, salt, chopped cilantro, and passion fruit purée.
3. Add the chilled shrimp to the mixture; stir gently to coat.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours to allow flavors to develop.
5. Serve on endive or lettuce leaves, garnished with pepper strips and lime slices.
